name: Ubique Minerals Limited
summary: Ubique Minerals Limited, a zinc exploration company, acquires, explores for, and develops mineral properties in Canada. The company primarily owns a 100% interest in the Daniel's Harbour Zinc Project consisting of 3 mineral licenses comprising 26 Units in the Daniels Harbour area of Newfoundland and Labrador. Ubique Minerals Limited was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
